title: Register permanent first admin with hardcoded email and password

requirements.text: On the backend, add a mechanism to seed a permanent first admin credential with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and the SHA-256 hash of password 'Munnu1998@'. This seed should be applied during canister initialization (or via an idempotent init/upgrade hook) so that the admin account always exists regardless of canister state.

quotes: rigister as a admin this email and password forever

acceptanceCriteria: The backend stores a hashed credential entry for email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' with the SHA-256 hash of 'Munnu1998@'.
The credential is seeded during canister initialization so it persists across upgrades.
Calling verifyAuthentication with the correct email and password returns a successful result.
Duplicate seeding does not create duplicate entries or overwrite other existing admin records.

requirements.text: On the AdminLoginPage, pre-fill the email field with 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and ensure the auto-seeding logic (first-admin credential seed) runs on page load when no admin exists, so the hardcoded admin is immediately usable without any manual registration step.

quotes: rigister as a admin this email and password forever

acceptanceCriteria: The AdminLoginPage pre-fills the email input with 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' on initial render.
When no admin exists yet, the first-admin seed is triggered automatically on page load.
After seeding, logging in with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and password 'Munnu1998@' succeeds and redirects to the admin dashboard.
No manual registration step is required for this admin account.

constraints: The password must be stored as a SHA-256 hash on the backend — never as plaintext.
The seeding must be idempotent: running it multiple times must not create duplicate admin entries.
Do not remove or break existing admin registration or invitation flows for other admins.
nonGoals: Changing the login UI design beyond pre-filling the email field.
Adding any new admin management features.
Modifying the quotation workflow or any other existing features.
